title: Clowder Cobblemon
description: An optimised, lightweight Cobblemon modpack designed for smooth gameplay and compatibility. Created with compatibility and optimisation in mind, this modpack provides smooth gameplay tailored specifically for Cobblemon, accessible to all server users.
body:
# Cobblemon Clowder Pack

Welcome to the **Cobblemon Clowder Pack**, specifically designed and developed for use on the Clowder Server and open to all that want to use it on your own environments.

This Pack is a carefully assembled built specifically around the Cobblemon mod, tailored by the players on the Clowder Server and planned to be played on our server. The primary aim is to enhance gameplay while maintaining stability, compatibility, while adding all possible content available for this mod.

### Key Features:
**Optimised Performance:**
- Selected mods to ensure minimal system usage.
- Lightweight and efficient, suitable for various PC setups.
- Regularly updated to improve (server side) stability and reduce PC lag.

**Enhanced Cobblemon Experience:**
- Includes the latest available Cobblemon content available, compatible with the version.
- Compatibility testing to provide integration of all included mods and addons.

**User-Friendly & Accessible:**
- Easy-to-use, just add and play.
- Open to all players.
The pack is lightweight, regardless of technical or hardware specifications.

<details>
<summary>Notes:</summary>
Available mods will depend on the Minecraft version, as compatibility varies between Minecraft versions.
</details>

#   
Join the Clowder community if you want play Cobblemon with us or on your own server today!
